# CSV Import Report

**Generated by**: Spreetail Expense Splitter App
**Timestamp**: 2026-06-15
**Target File**: `expenses_export.csv`

## Overview
This report lists the anomalies detected during the ingestion of the CSV file and the specific actions (resolutions) taken by the application to ensure data integrity before committing to the database.

---

## 1. Structural Anomalies (Auto-Fixed)

| Row | Anomaly Detected | Description | Action Taken |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| Multiple | `missing_currency` | Currency column was left blank. | **Auto-fixed**: Defaulted to the base currency `INR`. |
| 8, 14 | `invalid_date_format` | Dates were formatted inconsistently (e.g., `14/03/2026`, `Mar 14`). | **Auto-fixed**: Parsed and normalized all dates to ISO-8601 (`YYYY-MM-DD`). |
| 11 | `missing_payer` | The `paid_by` column was blank. | **Auto-fixed**: Assigned the active user who uploaded the CSV as the payer. |
| Multiple | `inconsistent_name` | Names contained trailing spaces or varying cases (e.g., "Aisha ", "rohan"). | **Auto-fixed**: Normalized to canonical User IDs via lowercase matching and trimming. |

## 2. Contextual Anomalies (Requires User Review)

| Row | Anomaly Detected | Description | Action Taken (User Resolution) |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| 12 | `negative_amount` | Amount was less than zero (`-500`). | **Resolved**: Flagged for review. User confirmed it as a data entry error; took the absolute value (`500`). |
| 22, 23 | `duplicate_entry` | Exact match found for description, amount, date, and payer on consecutive rows. | **Resolved**: Flagged for review. User selected "Keep First", resulting in Row 23 being skipped. |
| 31 | `zero_amount` | Expense amount was exactly `0`. | **Resolved**: Flagged for review. User chose to "Skip" the row entirely to avoid cluttering the ledger. |

## 3. Business Logic Anomalies (Informational / Auto-Routed)

| Row | Anomaly Detected | Description | Action Taken |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| 28 | `settlement_as_expense` | Row described as a debt repayment ("Rohan paid Aisha back"). | **Routed**: Bypassed the standard `expenses` table. Extracted payer/recipient and inserted directly into the `settlements` table. |
| 19 | `split_math_error` | Custom `split_details` amounts did not sum exactly to the principal amount. | **Auto-fixed**: Engine normalized the fractional remainders across participants so the sum strictly equals the principal. |

---

### End of Report
*All accepted rows have been successfully committed to the database. Skipped rows were safely ignored.*
